mechanism: Moral judgment is studied without asking what became visible first
possible_dampener: Model attention and salience upstream of judgment

mechanism: Process displaces persons and human consequences
possible_dampener: Trace lived effects behind categories and workflows

mechanism: Institutions make harms difficult to see report or name
possible_dampener: Create reporting channels consequence reviews and affected-person testimony

mechanism: Metrics deadlines threat or distraction crowd out vulnerability
possible_dampener: Protect time attention and escalation pathways

mechanism: People are reduced to cases categories costs or risks
possible_dampener: Restore narrative personhood and affected-person voice

mechanism: Only familiar vivid or in-group suffering becomes salient
possible_dampener: Use historical analysis testimony and institutional equity review

mechanism: Viral outrage crowds out slow structural or chronic harm
possible_dampener: Build durable attention practices beyond feed-driven reaction

mechanism: Professional role scripts hide dignity power or harm
possible_dampener: Use role reflection and cross-functional review

mechanism: Protected observers fail to notice burdens faced by others
possible_dampener: Use access audits lived evidence and humility about field of view

mechanism: Seeing would create guilt conflict sacrifice or loss of innocence
possible_dampener: Build accountability around avoidance and the costs of seeing
